title: LAOTHUAN RASUAI (Morning Prayer)
author: Ruangmei
coverImage:
<svg viewBox="0 0 600 900">
<rect width="600" height="900" fill="#1e3a5f"/>
<rect x="20" y="20" width="560" height="860" fill="none" stroke="#d4af37" stroke-width="6"/>
<text x="300" y="180" fill="#d4af37" font-family="serif" font-size="32" text-anchor="middle">CATHOLIC </text>
<text x="300" y="260" fill="#d4af37" font-family="serif" font-size="64" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle">LAUTHON </text>
<text x="300" y="330" fill="#d4af37" font-family="serif" font-size="48" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle">RASUAI </text>
<text x="190" y="460" fill="#d4af37" font-family="serif" font-size="44" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle">(MORNING </text>
<text x="420" y="460" fill="#d4af37" font-family="serif" font-size="44" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle">PRAYER) </text>
<text x="300" y="750" fill="#d4af37" font-family="serif" font-size="18" text-anchor="middle">Daily Prayers and Devotions </text>
</svg>
description: A morning prayers and religious recitations.
content: Cross lun.. † Kapu kanah khatni Bumaeng nthanmei jan khou. Amen. BANCHRA RUAI RIUMEI: (The Angelus) J: Poubaomei banchra ruai Mariam khou ndao lou the. Khatni kamei tihei bumaeng nthanmei ruai, kapum ti-nrit lou the. J: He riuwe Mariam… D: Jaolo Poubaomei bangpui tihei. J: Nang latkaeng thei laina akhou patmei su kandiu. J: He riuwe Mariam… D: Kumma latkaeng tei mansei su the. J: Khatni aniu pang khou bam the. J: He riuwe Mariam… D: Christa latrian guai khou, aniu ruai nthuimei sudiu khang. J: He nthanmei Ragwangh pui, aniu khang huainei louwo. KALUM DIKHO: (Let us pray) He kaipou nang nah Christa ruai, mansei su the. tumei tingkao banchra latdin khou ruai, thaina bammei aniu ruai, karam rianra khatni Cross paan khou ruai, Poubaomei ruai, ringthao datmei, nanghim khou guang tang khang, aniu lung khou Poubaomei, nang jaojian bunlou wo tuna nei ye. Aniu Poubaomei Jisu Christa paan khou ruai. Amen. Kapu, kanah, khatni Bumaeng nthanmei khou himdaimei su kandiu. (saliang kathum 3 times) Thaorei khou kumma, ntaoni khatni thei thaeng ni, taek maknga bam kandiu. TINGKAO LIAMMA: (The Regina Caeli) (Ringthao datmei gan khou Banchra ruai riumei, rasuai phaan tei mi rasuai hei sani na the) J: Tingkao liamma jaeng gai yo, Alleluia. D: Nang ruai puan patmei ka khang ruai, Alleluia. J: Kamei ruai sakanmei tei kumma Ringthao datkan the, Alleluia. D: Aniu khang Ragwangh khou huainei louwo, Alleluia. J: Jaeng gai tho khatni diugai tho, he nchangmei Mariam, Alleluia. D: Kalamthu Poubaomei kachang-kaling nga. Ringthao datkan the, Alleluia. KALUM DIKHO: (Let us pray) He Ragwangh, nangnah aniu Poubaomei Jisu Christa, ringthao datmei paan khou ruai, kandih kapumma khou, jaeng gaimei tiloumeipu. Tingsaeng jaeng neila mei panti, nchummei Mariam paan khou ruai, aniu ruai, laatou nudiu khang nulouwo, Aniu Poubaomei Jisu Christa paan khou ruai. Amen. HE ARAGWANGH: (I adore you) He Aragwangh. ai ruai nangta kalum me, nangta ai ruai alung kapumma ruai njian ne. Ata damloumei, ata nang tuang phuamling khou kaogut loumei, khatni tatkan mei, zingbang khou, ata gaek loupui jaeng khou ruai, nangta thuanku ye. Ai ruai atan kapumma, asei nang khou tipat re, Nang ruai ningmei nthanmei theilaina, tan guai hei taanlou khang, khatni nang thik-him tidai loudiu khang nulou wo. Nuan khou ruai khatni simei kathui khou ruai, duna ti-bam louwo. Nang tuang jaojian tei, akhou khatni ata njianmei, kaniu guaina khou, kagan kathuina khou naimei sulou wo. Amen. POUBAOMEI RASUAI: (Our Father) Tingkao khou bammei aniu pu, nangjan nthanmei su kandiu, nang gwangh kandih guang kandiu, Tingkao khou kumma kandih khou ni nang ruai ningmei su kandiu. Tingmik kathui aniu tuang taektu nsei aniu khang tilou wo, khatni aniu khou nkhuai loumei ta aniu ruai kuak loumei kumma, aniu ruai nkhuai loumei guai tani kuak lou wo, khatni aniuta nthiammei khou chaeng jailou riyo, kumme tiki simei khou ruai, aniuta tiduaklou wo. Amen. LUMMEI RASUAI: (My God I firmly believe in you) He Aragwangh mei guat ngam-makmei, Mei ruai tiguat lou n-gam makmei pu. Nang khou khatni nthanmei nchum mei guaina, Catholic phuamling ruai dinlou bammei ta, ai ruai ntipma lum the. Kalamthu, nang hei nchummei kiu di the. Mi guai hei kakhou tilianlou n-gam the. MACHUNMEI RASUAI: (My God I trust in you) He Aragwangh ka-ngan makmei nang ram gai khou, khatni nang latrian guai khou ngang lou the. Ai ruai anuan guai kuaklou khang lum me, khatni nkha-louni mei nang jaojian le ringsuangmei panti, Apoubaomei guloumei pu, Jisu Christa paan khou ruai laatou khang machun ne. NJIANMEI RASUAI: (My God) He Aragwangh ai ruai alung khatni abumaeng kapumma ruai, ram guaina rukhou ruai, nangta njian ne. kalamthu nang hei gai n-gampri-rimei khatni njianmei, kaguaina khang biumei de. Nangta njianpui jaeng ruai, akai kaigeimei tani arana ata njianmei kumma njian ne, Akhou taan nkhuai mei nunta ai ruai kuak louwe, akhatni ai ruai taan nkhuai lou kanmei nun guai khang tei ni kuak lou khang nei ye. HE RIUWE MARIAM: (Hail Mary) He riuwe jaojian ruai padik meipui Mariam, Poubaomei ruai nangta nduang lou the. Ntumei pang khou nangthu san-gaimei ye, khatni nangnah bam khou, kathai Jisu tei san-gaimei ye. Nthanmei pui Mariam Ragwangh pui, Nuanmei nun aniu khang ntao khatni, aniu theimei kagan khou huainei lou wo. Amen. Nthanmei Mariam, Apui sulou wo. RAGWANGH LATDAN RU: (The ten Commandments of God are) 1. Ai nang kaipou Ragwangh the. Ai ramma rah baimei ta kalam riyo. 2. Nang ruai kaipou nang Ragwangh janta kaji ram khou sa riyo. 3. Nang ruai nthanmei kaipou tingmik ta ningtou na nthanna ngaek nina ye. 4. Nangpui nangpu ta chakhuang su wo. 5. Nang mei suluai riyo. 6. Ntuh n-gan lung nkhuai riyo. 7. Nang ram hou riyo. 8. Nang kaigeimei ta nkhuaimei biak liang riyo. 9. Nang kaigeimei nouta kahao riyo. 10. Nang kaigeimei lanta kahao riyo. PHUAMLING LATDAN CHARUK: (The Six Commandments of the Church are) 1. Nthaeknei khatni nthanmei daimei, tingmik guai khou, mass nking nga bam kei wo. 2. Ram thiangmei khatni jan tunu makmei tingmik guai khou thiang ngo. 3. Rao-ngan khang tingkum khat lung khou nuan ndao guai nina de. 4. Tingkum lung khou Poubaomei ringthao datmei tingmik khou ramme thei, hei jaeng khou tei, rao-ngan khang nthanmei communion laani na de. 5. Rachap khou tanpi phungmei nunta nkha nina de. 6. Rao-ngan khang jeiriang kathum tuan makmei lung khou, noupu sunu mak ge. 7. Phuamling ruai numak mei khou, khum ngaai phung patna nousuan nu-mak ge. RACHAP TANLUAN CHANEI: (The seven Sacraments are) 1. Suaihiam duilup 2. Ti ntip loumei 3. Nthanmei Eucharist 4. Lunglai datmei 5. Anaomei khou thautei loumei 6. Rachap amuh tisu loumei 7. Nou suan mei ANIU TUANG BANCHRA KHOU HUAINEI MEI SUAI: (O my good Angel) He ata gaeklou khang Ragwangh ruai, kada patloumei banchra, Ragwangh jaojian khou ruai, nangta lumlou bammei ata tigaan louwo, Gaeklouwo, ti-ntun louwo, khatni chaeng jailouwo, Amen. Poubaomei aniuta suaihiam louwo, khatni simei khou ruai gaek louwo, khatni taek makmei panti khou aniuta tiguang louwo. Lum louna ntam kanmei bumaeng guaita, Ragwangh jaojian paan khou ruai, nchu-njaengmei khou nthaek kandiu. Amen. J: He Christian mei nunta nkhaloumeipui Mariam, D: Aniu khang huainei nkha louwo. Kapu, kanah khatni bumaeng nthanmei jan khou. Amen.

title: ZINGBANG T+RASUAI (Night Prayer)
author: Ruangmei
coverImage: <svg viewBox="0 0 600 900"><!-- Background --><rect width="600" height="900" fill="#1e3a5f"/><!-- Border --><rect x="20" y="20" width="560" height="860" fill="none" stroke="#d4af37" stroke-width="6"/><!-- Title --><text x="300" y="180" font-family="serif" font-size="32" fill="#d4af37" text-anchor="middle"> CATHOLIC </text><text x="300" y="260" font-family="serif" font-size="64" font-weight="bold" fill="#d4af37" text-anchor="middle"> JINGBANG </text><text x="300" y="330" font-family="serif" font-size="48" font-weight="bold" fill="#d4af37" text-anchor="middle"> RASUAI </text><text x="190" y="460" font-family="serif" font-size="44" font-weight="bold" fill="#d4af37" text-anchor="middle"> (NIGHT </text><text x="420" y="460" font-family="serif" font-size="44" font-weight="bold" fill="#d4af37" text-anchor="middle"> PRAYER) </text><!-- Subtitle --><text x="300" y="750" font-family="serif" font-size="18" fill="#d4af37" text-anchor="middle"> Daily Prayers and Devotions </text></svg>
description: A Night prayers and religious recitations.
content: JINGBANG RASUAI (Night prayer) J: Asei hei aniu guai ruai Ragwangh tuang jaojian laatao mei khang tei, Ragwanghta thuanku na kalum dikho. (matak khat rim rima kalum mei) Aniu ruai nkhuai meitan taanlou kanmei guai khang tei ni, kuaklou khang nei dikho.Khatni nthuimei gaimei tan guai taan, loumei tei ka khang katlou dikho. (rim rim loumei) J: Cross lun † D: Kapu, kanah khatni bumaeng nthanmei jan khou Amen. HE ARAGWANGH: (I adore you) He Aragwangh ai ruai nangta kalum me, nangta alung kapumma ruai njian ne, ata damloumei. Ata nang tuang phuamling khou kaogut loumei, khatni tatkan mei tingmik khou, ata gaeklou puijaeng khou ruai nangta thuanku we. Ai ruai asei nang khou taan nkhuai lou kanmei khang tei kuak lou wo, khatni gaimei tan taanlou khuanne thei laalou wo. Ai ruaina jaeng nthaek bam pukhou ata gaeklou wo, khatni simei kapumma khou ruai ata tiduak lou wo. Nangtuang jaojian tei akhou khatni ata njianmei kaniu guaina khou, kagan kathuina khou naimei sulou wo. Amen. POUBAOMEI RASUAI: (Our Father) J: Tingkao khou bammei aniu pu, nang jan nthanmei su kandiu, nang gwangh kandih guang kandiu, tingkao khou Theater bammei aniu pu, nang jan nthanmei su kandiu. D: Tingmik kathui aniu tuang taektu asei aniu khang tilouwo, khatni aniu khou nkhuai loumei ta aniu ruai kuak loumei kumma, aniu ruai nkhuai loumei guaitani kuak louwo, khatni aniuta nthiammei khou chaeng jailou ri yo, kumme tiki simei khou ruai aniuta ti-duak louwo. Amen. KAJIAB GUAI RUAI LUMMEI: (I believe in God) D: Tingkao khatni kandih damloumeipu, ngampri-rimei kapu Ragwanghta, khatni khatna mei kanah Poubaomei Jisu Christa ta ai ruai lum the. Kata bumaeng nthanmei ruai kapum ti-nrit lou the. Nthanmei tunah pui Mariam ruai puanlou the. Pontus Pilat bang khou rianra akhaeng lana Cross khou thaeng kan the. THEI the khatni phuplou kan the. Kamei taruai keikan the. Neithum puinei kamei theimei khou ruai ringthao dat the. Kamei tingkao kudat kan the. Ngampri-rimei kapu Ragwangh baanjat khou bam the. Hei khou tei ruai kamei ring bammei, khatni theikan meita latjan su khang keidat puni. Bumaeng nthanmei, nthanmei Catholic phuamling, nthanmei nun le lung khatna mei, nuan guaita kuak loumei, meipum ringthao datmei, khatni ringsuang mei panti ta ai ruai lum the. Amen. HE RIUWE NTHANMEI LIAMMA: (Hail Holy Queen) D: He riuwe nthanmei liamma, aniu khang jaojian thaimei pui, aniu panti, aniu ram gai, khatni aniu ruai machunmei richui lou wo. Mikdui njaengdih khou hei ruai Eve kikta kadai keimei sansimei nah nun, aniu ruai huaina khatni kapma thiusaeng jaina nang khou kao bam me. He aniu khang sa nkha loumei pui, jaojian thaimei nang mikjao tei ruai, aniu biak thang ganri lou wo. Khatni aniu panti mud keimei bam khou hei ruai kanpat mei tang khou, nangnah bam khou tuang kathai Jisu tei aniu khou tihou lou wo. He jaojian thaimei, he njian thaimei, he lungning njaengmei nchangmei. Amen. NJIANMEI APUI MARIAM: (Dear Mother Mary, ever a Virgin) J: Njianmei apui Mariam, tingsaeng jaeng nchang meipui, D: Abumaeng kan khang ata nkha louwo. J: He riuwe Mariam… (saliang 3 Hail Mary 3 times) D: He riuwe jaojian ruai padik meipui Mariam, Poubaomei ruai nangta nduang lou the. Ntumei pang khou nangthu san-gaimei ye, khatni nangnah bam khou, kathai Jisu tei san-gaimei ye. Nthanmei pui Mariam Ragwangh pui, nuanmei nun aniu khang ntao khatni, Aniu theimei kagan khou huainei louwo Amen. LUMMEI NUN RASUAI: (Prayer of the faithful) J: Pope aniu tuang Bishop khatni baimei Bishop guaita, Poubaomei ruai jaojian, louna gaek lou khang, khatni nkha loudiu khang, Ragwangh mei nunta chaeng jailoudiu khang, aniu kalum dikho. D: He Ragwangh nangmei nun rasuai tihei chulou wo jaojian lou wo. J: Poubaomei nang khou aniu ruai kalumme, hei kiuthu, aniu amuh rachap tatchui meinun, Catechist nun, lumloumeinun, khatni kaniu tan guai khou suan tilou khang Poubaomei ruai suaihiam lou wo. D: He Ragwangh nangmei nun rasuai tihei chulou wo jaojian lou wo. J: Poubaomei nang khou aniu ruai kalum me, hei kiuthu, akhaeng thaimei lungning kapumma tipat ngammei, khatni aniu tuang seminary mei guaita jaojian tan taan ni khang tilou wo. D: He Ragwangh nangmei nun rasuai tihei chulou wo jaojian lou wo. J: Poubaomei nang khou aniu ruai kalum me, hei kiuthu, Poubaomei drakha laopuk khou lungning daimei, n-ganmei nah nun khatni ntumei nah nun guaita, amuh tisu ngam khang khatni rachap tatchuimei lunlung tisu lou wo. D: He Ragwangh nangmei nun rasuai tihei chulou wo jaojian lou wo. J: Poubaomei nang khou aniu ruai kalumme, hei kiuthu, aniu puipu nun khang, riangruai nun khang, aniuta nkhalou bammei nun khang, Poubaomei ruai suan tilou wo. D: He Ragwangh nangmei nun rasuai tihei chulou wo jaojian lou wo. J: Poubaomei khou aniu ruai kalum me, hei kiuthu, nthanmei Nazareth kaikhun lun-lung tei kumma Catholic phuamling mei nunta lung kunna bamdiu khang, karam jian lung khou khatni nchu-njaengmei tei Poubaomei ruai njian louna tilou wo. D: He Ragwangh nangmei nun rasuai tihei chulou wo jaojian lou wo. J: Poubaomei khou aniu ruai kalumme hei kiuthu, lungning gaimei guaita nchummei gospel riu khou njian louna Poubaomei ruai jailou wo. D: He Ragwangh nangmei nun rasuai tihei chulou wo jaojian lou wo. J: Poubaomei nang khou aniu ruai kalumme hei kiuthu, lum louna ntam kanmei guai khang, Poubaomei ruai tingsaeng jaeng nthaek mei tilou wo. D: He Ragwangh nangmei nun rasuai tihei chulou wo jaojian lou wo. KALUM DIKHO: (Let us pray) D: He Ragwangh nang hei aniu duplou pui bam me, khatni aniu pumtan ne. Nang hei thaorei khou na ruai jaojian patpui bam me, kumma lum nthukmei nangmei nun rasuai guai tei chulou wo. khatni aniu ruai lum nthuk nga nei bammei tihei latou khang tilou wo. aniu Poubaomei Jisu Christa paan khou ruai, Amen. LUNGNING CHAENG JAOMEI: (Matak khat rim rimmei) Lung laimei rasuai: (O my God) D: He Ragwangh alungning rianrana anuan kaguaina kuaklou khang nei ye, khatni nuan guaita ram kaguaina khang suang karang the, kalamthu nuan ruai nang tuang meiping kanmei tanti mphang khang biulou the. Kumma nuan ruai ai njian bammei kanloumeipu, Jisu Christa ta Cross khou thaeng kan the. Khatni kaguai na khang suang, nuan ruai ka-ngan makmei, gaimei nangta tirianra lou the. Heikum thena nang jaojian ruai nkha loumei paan khou ruai, nangta tirianra datlak khe. Khatni nuan tannu meibam guai khou ruai kadan thai na, mpan ni the tuna alung ntipma ding the. Amen. J: Gaichui mei Jisu, ata jaojian lou wo, khatni ata kuak lou wo. D: Jisu, Mariam khatni Joseph, alung khatni abumaeng nangniu khou tipat the. Jisu, Mariam khatni Joseph, ai ruai theinimei gan khou nkha lou wo. Jisu, Mariam khatni Joseph, nangniu khou ai ruai abumaeng hei, nchu-njaeng nga tipatmei sudiu. J: He Christian mei nunta nkha loumei pui Mariam. D: Aniu khang huainei nkha lou wo Kapu, kanah khatni Bumaeng nthanmei jan khou Amen.
